caption: In the video, a person is showcasing a set of decorative dies from the "Feels Like Frost Suite," specifically the "Frosted Frames 5 Dies." The individual holds the package with their left hand while using their right hand to point out and highlight various features of the dies. The dies include intricate designs such as snowflakes, a rectangular frame, and other frosty patterns. The background displays a catalog page featuring similar items and descriptions, emphasizing the winter theme of the suite. The person appears to be explaining or demonstrating the uses and details of these dies, likely for crafting or scrapbooking purposes.
